entries.value: A lone candle burns — yet the dust says no one has passed in years
Embers still glow in a fire pit; someone camped here recently
A shuttered lantern hangs, its oil low
Pale phosphorescent fungus casts a dim glow
A faint magical light seeps from the very stones
A brazier of coals, tended by unseen hands
Daylight leaks through a crack far overhead
